item.title: Overview
item.description:
IDPicker helps students evaluate strengths, explore academic and career options, and get guided recommendations.

Primary User Roles

  • Student
  • Advisor
  • Parent

Panel Entry Points

  • Student Panel: main user learning and recommendation workspace
  • Advisor Panel: supervision, student support, and sub-advisor administration
  • Parent Panel: visibility for linked students

Student Account Types

  • Linked Student: account linked to parent visibility model
  • Individual Student: independent account with direct access only

Image placeholder: Add screenshot or diagram showing where each role signs in.

item.title: Quick Start
item.description:
Step 1: Open the Login Page

Use the correct login URL for your environment.

Image placeholder: Add screenshot of login page with visible URL in browser bar.

Step 2: Sign In

  1. Enter email/username.
  2. Enter password.
  3. Click Sign In.

For OAuth login, click the provider button (for example Google) if enabled.

Image placeholder: Add screenshot of filled sign-in form (mask sensitive data).

Step 3: Create First Item

After login, open Dashboard and start the first guided workflow:

item.title: Access URLs
item.description:
Use this page as the single source of truth for platform URLs.

Production URLs

Purpose URL
Main Platform Login https://app.idpicker.com/login
Student Panel https://app.idpicker.com/student/dashboard
Advisor Panel https://app.idpicker.com/advisor/dashboard
Parent Panel https://app.idpicker.com/parent/dashboard
Help Center https://app.idpicker.com/help-center

Staging/Test URLs

Purpose URL
API Base https://testapi.idpicker.com/api
Language Preference API https://testapi.idpicker.com/api/set-language-preference/

URL Validation Checklist

  1. Login URL is reachable.
  2. Role-based panel redirects are correct.
  3. Unauthorized role access is blocked.

Image placeholder: Add screenshot of browser tabs showing each panel URL after login.

Supported Platforms

Dependencies

Configure Settings

Validate Installation

Provide checks to confirm successful setup.

item.description:
Recommended Workflow

Explain the preferred sequence of actions.

Security Tips

List secure usage guidelines.

Performance Tips

Describe ways to keep usage efficient.

item.description:
Configuration Keys

Document each key, type, default, and description.

Example Config

Provide a complete configuration example.

item.description:
Problem: Cannot Sign In

  • Possible causes
  • Resolution steps

Problem: Feature Not Working

  • Possible causes
  • Resolution steps

Problem: Slow Performance

  • Possible causes
  • Resolution steps

item.title: FAQ
item.description:
Question 1

Answer.

Question 2

Answer.

Question 3

Answer.

item.title: 01. Authentication Guide
item.description:
Login with Email and Password

  1. Open Access URLs.
  2. Visit the Main Platform Login URL.
  3. Enter email and password.
  4. Click Sign In.
  5. Verify dashboard load.

Image placeholder: Add screenshot of student login form and success redirect.

Login with Google OAuth

  1. On login page, click Continue with Google.
  2. Select account and approve access.
  3. Verify redirect to Student Dashboard.

Image placeholder: Add screenshot sequence for OAuth start and dashboard redirect.

item.title: 02. Dashboard Guide
item.description:
Dashboard Purpose

The dashboard centralizes mentor access, assessments, reports, and upgrade flow.

Steps

  1. Log in as student.
  2. Review top cards and pillar widgets.
  3. Open AI Mentor from dashboard CTA.
  4. Open each core pillar and confirm page navigation.
  5. Open reports and subscription CTA.

Image placeholder: Add full dashboard screenshot with numbered annotations.

item.title: 03. Assessment Guide
item.description:
Start an Assessment

  1. Open Assessments from dashboard.
  2. Begin questionnaire.
  3. Answer all required questions.
  4. Submit and wait for processing.

Resume Interrupted Session

  1. Return to Assessments.
  2. Select Resume.
  3. Continue from the last unanswered item.

View Results

  1. Open completed assessment card.
  2. Review summary and details.

Image placeholder: Add screenshots for start, in-progress, and completed states.

item.title: 04. Recommendation Guide
item.description:
View Recommendations

  1. Complete assessment.
  2. Open Recommendations section.
  3. Review suggested career paths and rationale.

Download Recommendation Report

  1. Click Download Recommendations.
  2. Save file locally.
  3. Verify downloaded content opens correctly.

Image placeholder: Add recommendation list and download button screenshot.

item.title: 05. Personality Guide
item.description:
Open Personality Results

  1. Navigate to Personality section.
  2. Open latest completed assessment.

Interpret Radar Chart

Review trait values such as:

  • Social Adaptability
  • Emotional Regulation
  • Cognitive Flexibility
  • Achievement Motivation

Image placeholder: Add radar chart screenshot with trait labels and score values.

item.title: 06. AI Mentorship Guide
item.description:
Start Mentor Chat

  1. From dashboard, click Engage Your Mentor.
  2. Type your question.
  3. Continue conversation with follow-up prompts.

Get Guided Advice

  1. Open Guided Advice from mentor panel.
  2. Review step-by-step recommendations.

Image placeholder: Add chat screenshot with example mentor response.

item.title: 07. University Search Guide
item.description:
Search Programs

  1. Open University Search.
  2. Enter university or program keyword.
  3. Review matching results.

Filter Results

Use filters for:

  • Field of study
  • Degree type
  • Language

Open Program Details

  1. Click a program card.
  2. Review tuition, duration, country, and language.

Image placeholder: Add screenshot with active filters and result cards.

item.title: 08. Resources Guide
item.description:
Access Shared Resources

  1. Open Resources from navigation.
  2. Browse advisor-shared files.

Find Specific Material

  1. Use search by title/description/file name.
  2. Apply filters by type, size, and visibility.
  3. Sort results as needed.

Open or Download File

  1. Click resource item.
  2. Open preview or download.

Image placeholder: Add resources page screenshot with filters and counters.

item.title: 09. Help Center Guide
item.description:
Submit a Ticket

  1. Open Help Center.
  2. Click Submit New Ticket.
  3. Fill subject, category, priority, description.
  4. Submit and note ticket ID.

Track Existing Tickets

  1. Open My Tickets.
  2. Check status updates.
  3. Open ticket for details.

Image placeholder: Add ticket submission and My Tickets screenshot.

item.title: 10. Subscription Guide
item.description:
Upgrade Plan

  1. Click Upgrade from dashboard or restricted feature prompt.
  2. Compare plans.
  3. Select desired tier.
  4. Complete payment/confirmation flow.

Image placeholder: Add plan comparison and upgrade button screenshot.

item.title: 11. Account and Settings Guide
item.description:
Profile Updates

  1. Open Settings.
  2. Edit profile fields.
  3. Save changes.

Security

  1. Open Password and Security.
  2. Change password.
  3. Confirm with current credentials.

Account Deletion

  1. Open Delete Account.
  2. Confirm action.
  3. Verify logout and account removal.

Parent Access

  1. Invite parent/guardian.
  2. Review linked access.
  3. Remove access when needed.

Image placeholder: Add settings page screenshot with profile and security sections.

item.title: 12. Language Guide
item.description:
Change Language

  1. Open language switch from header.
  2. Select EN or TR.
  3. Confirm all labels update instantly.

Validate Language State

  1. Navigate to a different page.
  2. Confirm selected language persists.

Image placeholder: Add before/after screenshots for EN and TR mode.

item.title: Advisor Login and Dashboard
item.description:
Advisor Login

  1. Open advisor login URL from Access URLs.
  2. Enter advisor credentials.
  3. Click Sign In.

Dashboard Navigation

  1. Review assigned student groups.
  2. Open student profile summary.
  3. Check alerts, pending actions, and activity timeline.

Image placeholder: Add advisor login and dashboard screenshots.

item.title: Sub-Advisor Management
item.description:
Create Sub-Advisor

  1. Open Advisor Settings or Team Management.
  2. Click Create Sub-Advisor.
  3. Fill required fields: name, email, scope, and assigned student group.
  4. Save and send invitation.

Manage Permissions

  1. Open sub-advisor record.
  2. Configure visibility scope.
  3. Save and test effective access.

Deactivate Sub-Advisor

  1. Open sub-advisor account.
  2. Set status to inactive.
  3. Verify access is revoked.

Image placeholder: Add form screenshot and permission matrix screenshot.

item.title: Linked Student Guide
item.description:
Parent Access Flow

  1. Parent receives invite.
  2. Parent activates account.
  3. Linked student appears in parent dashboard.

What Parents Can View

  • Progress summary
  • Milestone completion
  • Selected recommendation insights

What Parents Cannot Edit

  • Student-only private settings
  • Restricted assessment configuration

Image placeholder: Add parent dashboard with linked student card and progress widgets.
